system.damage: tooth and claw d10 (_hand_, _grabby_), hoof and antler d10+2 (_close_, _forceful_), rending strength d10+2 (_hand_, _forceful_, _messy_)
system.specialQuality: confused and frustrated by human speech, host to dozens of beast-spirits

selected: to see people as either threat or prey

system.moves:
- Assume the aspect(s) of one or more beasts
- Do something impossible for a human, easy for a beast
- Suffer through a terrible wound unfazed, healing with a few days’ rest
- Ask beasts or spirits (even quiet ones) for information or favors

When a young Hillfolk shows signs of being touched by spirits, their band had best seek out a spirit-talker (page 235) to mentor the child. Without such guidance, these youths might forsake their humanity, forget their language, and eventually bind spirits of the wild to their very flesh.
